title: Visual Galore
description: A client side modpack which makes the game look and feel better without shaders!
body:
A client side modpack which makes my poopy laptop run greatly and looks great(check gallery). These are mods that I personnaly think look great. It's quilt and if you want to add a fabric mod don't worry fabric mods work on quilt. This mod adds no blocks or mobs or effects or stuff since it is client side so just looks and means that it should work with your friend or on a server. And I used no shaders in the gallery.

Credit to the guys who asked:
-  [Memory Leak Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/memoryleakfix)
-  [Fog Looks Good Now](https://modrinth.com/mod/fog-looks-good-now-fabric)
-  [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling)
- [Biome Particle Weather  _(this mod is cool and works great with Particle rain)_](https://modrinth.com/mod/biome_particle_weather)
- [Effective _(very good)_](https://modrinth.com/mod/effective)

I will be updating the credits every five updates, sorry to any mod dudes who can't wait.
And by base mod I mean that, this modpack is meant to have other mods easily added into it. And If you hear birds chirping and don't like it, that's _Dynamic surrondings_ fault, Just go to the mod's menu and set the ambient volume to 0 since that mod adds other cool things.

> -2807698377768231505 is a really cool seed.
